message:
feat(e2e): add granular busy-retry diagnostics to executor and reports

Introduce BusyClass, BatchPhase, and BusyDiagnostic types for
fine-grained classification of retryable errors. Track busy retries by
class (Busy/BusySnapshot/BusyRecovery) and phase (Begin/Body/Commit/
Rollback), record top conflicting page numbers from BusySnapshot errors,
and surface retry diagnostics in engine run reports and hot-path profile
markdown output. Replace duplicated stats merge logic with
WorkerStats::merge_from.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
